purpose: Record the connected Google Drive Eden Skye Studios discovery and align it with the locked exact image source manifest used by the app.
approved_render_rule: Rendered site/PWA pages must use only the exact generated standalone source images from the canonical app image manifest. Uploaded boards and collage images remain layout references only.

verified_drive_source_truth_files.title: EDEN_SKYE_OS_SOURCE_TRUTH_LOCK.md
verified_drive_source_truth_files.finding: Confirms visual boards and user-approved chat decisions as source truth; live secrets, Shopify production configuration, Supabase production tables, and Vercel production routes are not verified.

verified_drive_source_truth_files.title: EDEN_SKYE_OS_FOLDER_TREE.md
verified_drive_source_truth_files.finding: Defines the 00 through 24 OS folder tree now discovered under the primary OS folder.

verified_drive_source_truth_files.title: EDEN_SKYE_OS_FILE_MANIFEST.csv
verified_drive_source_truth_files.finding: Exists but only contains the CSV header, so it is not yet a complete Drive file inventory.

verified_drive_source_truth_files.title: STOCK_IMAGE_MASTER_MANIFEST.csv
verified_drive_source_truth_files.finding: Defines planned Eden Skye portfolio slots eden-skye-001 through eden-skye-080; it does not yet contain the exact locked 19 rendered app image filenames or hashes.

verified_drive_source_truth_files.title: MODEL_IMAGE_REQUIREMENTS.csv
verified_drive_source_truth_files.finding: Defines required image classes: identity lock, portfolio portrait, lifestyle, website hero, social, HeyGen, wardrobe safe, and background context.

verified_drive_source_truth_files.title: Image_File_Naming_Rules.md
verified_drive_source_truth_files.finding: Requires image/video factory naming governance, adult-only safety, identity consistency, HeyGen readiness, Supabase asset state, admin approval, quarantine, and regeneration.

primary_os_root_generated_pngs.finding: The primary OS folder contains freshly created PNG images from 2026-06-11T23:48:57Z through 2026-06-11T23:49:05Z using generic ChatGPT filenames. These likely correspond to the generated standalone source image set, but filename/hash-level equality with the app manifest was not verified through Drive metadata.

older_uploaded_reference_pngs.finding: Older uploaded boards and reference PNGs are present in user_files and Drive. These remain layout references only and must not render as production page/model/closet assets.

exact_app_image_alignment.drive_filename_status: Generic Drive ChatGPT filenames discovered; exact canonical filenames not found by Drive search.
exact_app_image_alignment.required_next_drive_action: Rename or copy the 19 verified Drive PNGs into a canonical folder using the exact filenames from docs/EDEN_EXACT_IMAGE_SOURCE_MANIFEST_2026-06-12.json, then attach Drive file IDs and SHA-256 hashes to this manifest.

missing_or_unverified_drive_alignment: No Drive file was found by exact app filename searches for eden-standalone-home-hero-alexis-neon-es.png, eden-model-alexis-voss-profile.png, eden-closet-full-body-alexis-black-look.png, or eden-env-modern-bedroom.png.
The Google Docs named canonical image manifest/receipt/visual documents were discovered but returned empty text through the connector.
The Drive-level file manifest CSV currently contains only headers, so it cannot be treated as a complete file inventory until populated.
Drive metadata did not expose SHA-256 checksums for the generic PNGs in the connector output; app source hashes remain authoritative.
app_upgrade_rule: The app must keep using docs/EDEN_EXACT_IMAGE_SOURCE_MANIFEST_2026-06-12.json as canonical render truth, and use this Drive discovery manifest as the operating-system alignment layer. No rendered page is allowed to silently switch to Drive thumbnails, collage boards, or generic Drive assets.
